overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a waterfront park area. The character moves from a tree-lined sidewalk past a large docked ship, through a covered pergola walkway, and circles a central fountain with a statue before ascending stairs. The setting appears to be a sunny afternoon in an urban park with scattered pedestrians.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk next to street with parked vehicles, approaching a waterfront park area

entered.detail: white and silver vehicles parked along the curb
mature deciduous trees lining the pedestrian path
trimmed green hedges bordering the walkway
large historic vessel with tall masts visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined sidewalk next to a street with parked cars. The path is bordered by green bushes and trees, with a large ship visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with historic ship

events.description: exits tree-lined path into open plaza revealing large docked ship
turns right toward covered pergola walkway

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the ship and turning toward a covered walkway lined with flowers

notable_agents.action: person in light clothing walking across the plaza

entered.detail: long covered walkway with brick columns and wooden beams
raised planters with red and white flowers along the pergola

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into an open plaza revealing a large historic ship docked nearby. The character turns toward a long covered pergola structure lined with flowering plants while other pedestrians walk through the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pergola walkway with benches and hanging plants

events.description: enters covered pergola with brick columns and wooden roof beams

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded pergola passage passing benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket standing near bench looking at phone

entered.detail: wooden park benches positioned along the walkway
potted plants suspended from the pergola roof beams

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pergola walkway with brick columns and wooden beams overhead. The path is lined with benches and flowering vines, with dappled sunlight creating patterns on the tiled ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden plaza with central fountain and statue

events.description: exits pergola into open fountain plaza
begins circling around the central fountain to view it from different angles
ascends brick stairs leaving fountain area

agents.ego_description: circling around the fountain to view it from different angles before walking up stairs toward upper terrace

notable_agents.action: person standing near fountain edge observing the water jets

entered.detail: large circular water feature with multiple jets around the perimeter
tall stone sculpture of two figures embracing at the fountain center
wide staircase with red brick steps leading to upper terrace
multi-story urban buildings visible beyond the park

segments.scene_description: The character exits the pergola into a formal garden plaza featuring a large circular fountain with a central statue. The character walks around the fountain, passing other pedestrians, then ascends a set of brick stairs toward an upper terrace area with city buildings visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban sidewalk into a bright, formal garden plaza. It begins along a tree-lined path bordered by parked cars and green bushes, moving forward until a large historic ship comes into view in the distance. As the character emerges into an open plaza, the scene shifts toward a long covered pergola where flowering plants and brick columns create a tunnel of dappled sunlight across the tiled ground. The camera then follows the path out of the pergola and into a formal garden, circling a large fountain with a central statue amidst scattered pedestrians. Finally, the movement concludes as the character ascends a set of brick stairs toward an upper terrace with city buildings rising in the background.
